---
title: "DESeq2_Clemson_output – full QC + stats + legacy‑compatible (2025‑06‑30)"
author: "Rooksie Noorai (orig) → Galen O'Shea‑Stone (refactor + QC)"
date: "2025‑06‑30"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
set.seed(666)
output_dir <- "deseq2_outputs"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# ── legacy mode switch ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
legacy <- TRUE   # set FALSE to keep stricter QC rules from the first refactor
```

## 1  Load libraries
```{r libs}
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

core_pkgs <- c("DESeq2", "apeglm", "AnnotationDbi", "org.Gg.eg.db",
               "clusterProfiler", "enrichplot", "pathview")
qc_pkgs   <- c("ggplot2", "pheatmap", "vsn")
all_pkgs  <- c(core_pkgs, qc_pkgs)

for (pkg in all_pkgs) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE))
    BiocManager::install(pkg, ask = FALSE)
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(pkg, character.only = TRUE))
}
```

## 2  Read counts & metadata
```{r read-counts}
Expression <- read.delim("redo.ensembl.stranded.counts.renamed.subset.txt")
rownames(Expression) <- Expression$Geneid
cts <- as.matrix(Expression[ , -1]); storage.mode(cts) <- "integer"

condition <- factor(c("controlF","controlF","experimental","controlP",
                      "experimental","experimental","controlF",
                      "controlP","controlP","controlP"))
coldata   <- data.frame(condition = condition, row.names = colnames(cts))

dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = cts, colData = coldata, design = ~ condition)

# ── gene filter ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if (legacy) {
  keep <- rowSums(counts(dds) > 0) > 0                 # original rule (≥1 read anywhere)
} else {
  keep <- rowSums(counts(dds) >= 10) >= 3              # stricter rule
}
dds <- dds[keep, ]
```

## 3  Run DESeq2
```{r deseq-run}
dds <- DESeq(dds)
resultsNames(dds)
```

## 4  Variance‑stabilised QC
```{r vst-qc, fig.width=6.5, fig.height=5}
vsd_fun <- if (legacy) rlog else vst
vsd     <- vsd_fun(dds, blind = FALSE)

pca_plot <- plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "condition") + ggtitle("PCA – variance‑stabilised counts")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "PCA_vst.pdf"), pca_plot, width = 6, height = 5)

# size factors
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "size_factors.pdf"))
barplot(sizeFactors(dds), las = 2, ylab = "sizeFactor", main = "Size factors")
dev.off()

# dispersion trend
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "dispersion_trend.pdf"))
plotDispEsts(dds)
dev.off()
```

## 5  Extra QC metrics
```{r qc-extra}
mat <- as.matrix(dist(t(assay(vsd))))
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "sample_distance_heatmap.pdf"))
  pheatmap(mat, clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean", clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
           main = "Sample–sample distance (VST/Rlog)")
  dev.off()

pdf(file.path(output_dir, "cooks_distance_boxplot.pdf"))
  boxplot(log10(assays(dds)[["cooks"]]), range = 0, outline = FALSE,
          las = 2, ylab = "log10 Cook's distance", main = "Influential observations")
  dev.off()

pdf(file.path(output_dir, "meanSD_vst.pdf"))
  vsn::meanSdPlot(assay(vsd))
  dev.off()

res_tmp <- results(dds)
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "pvalue_histogram.pdf"))
  hist(res_tmp$pvalue, breaks = 50, col = "grey", main = "P-value distribution", xlab = "p-value")
  dev.off()
```

## 6  Experimental vs controlF
```{r exp-vs-ctrlF}
res_raw <- results(dds, name = "condition_experimental_vs_controlF")
res_shr <- lfcShrink(dds, coef = "condition_experimental_vs_controlF", type = "apeglm")

# choose which LFCs feed into enrichment
lfc_for_gsea <- if (legacy) res_raw$log2FoldChange else res_shr$log2FoldChange

# output table
res_final <- data.frame(baseMean        = res_raw$baseMean,
                        log2FC          = res_raw$log2FoldChange,
                        log2FC_shrunken = res_shr$log2FoldChange,
                        lfcSE_shrunken  = res_shr$lfcSE,
                        pvalue          = res_raw$pvalue,
                        padj            = res_raw$padj,
                        row.names       = rownames(res_raw))
write.csv(res_final, file.path(output_dir, "DESeq2_experimental_vs_controlF.csv"))

# sig counts
sig <- res_raw$padj < 0.05 & !is.na(res_raw$padj)
up   <- sum(sig & res_raw$log2FoldChange > 0)
down <- sum(sig & res_raw$log2FoldChange < 0)
write.table(data.frame(up, down),
            file = file.path(output_dir, "sig_gene_counts_experimental_vs_controlF.txt"),
            sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE)
```

## 7  Experimental vs controlP
```{r exp-vs-ctrlP}
dds_P <- dds; dds_P$condition <- relevel(dds_P$condition, ref = "controlP"); dds_P <- DESeq(dds_P)
res_P <- results(dds_P, name = "condition_experimental_vs_controlP")
res_P_shr <- lfcShrink(dds_P, coef="condition_experimental_vs_controlP", type="apeglm")
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_P_shr), file.path(output_dir, "DESeq2_experimental_vs_controlP.csv"))
```

## 8  ControlF vs controlP
```{r ctrlF-vs-ctrlP}
dds_CF <- dds; dds_CF$condition <- relevel(dds_CF$condition, ref = "controlP"); dds_CF <- DESeq(dds_CF)
res_CF_raw <- results(dds_CF, name = "condition_controlF_vs_controlP")
res_CF_shr <- lfcShrink(dds_CF, coef = "condition_controlF_vs_controlP", type = "apeglm")
res_CF <- data.frame(baseMean        = res_CF_raw$baseMean,
                     log2FC          = res_CF_raw$log2FoldChange,
                     log2FC_shrunken = res_CF_shr$log2FoldChange,
                     lfcSE_shrunken  = res_CF_shr$lfcSE,
                     pvalue          = res_CF_raw$pvalue,
                     padj            = res_CF_raw$padj,
                     row.names       = rownames(res_CF_raw))
write.csv(res_CF, file.path(output_dir, "DESeq2_controlF_vs_controlP.csv"))
```

## 9  Export normalised counts
```{r export-counts}
write.csv(counts(dds, normalized = TRUE), file.path(output_dir, "normalised_counts.csv"))
```

---
### Gene‑set enrichment (GO & KEGG)
*Set `run_gsea <- TRUE` if you want these to execute.*

```{r gsea, eval=FALSE}
run_gsea <- TRUE
if (run_gsea) {
  ranked <- lfc_for_gsea
  names(ranked) <- rownames(res_raw)
  ranked <- sort(na.omit(ranked), decreasing = TRUE)

  # ---- GO GSEA ----------------------------------------------------------------
  gse_go <- gseGO(geneList     = ranked,
                  keyType      = "ENSEMBL",
                  ont          = "ALL",
                  OrgDb        = org.Gg.eg.db,
                  nPerm        = 10000,
                  minGSSize    = 3,
                  maxGSSize    = 800,
                  pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                  pAdjustMethod = if (legacy) "none" else "BH",
                  verbose      = TRUE)

  pdf(file.path(output_dir, "GO_GSEA_dotplot.pdf"))
  print(dotplot(gse_go, showCategory = 10, split = ".sign") +
          facet_grid(. ~ .sign))
  dev.off()

  # ---- KEGG GSEA --------------------------------------------------------------
  ids <- bitr(names(ranked), fromType = "ENSEMBL", toType = "ENTREZID",
              OrgDb = org.Gg.eg.db)
  # emulate original double‑dedup if legacy
  ids <- ids[!duplicated(ids$ENTREZID), ]
  if (legacy) ids <- ids[!duplicated(ids$ENSEMBL), ]

  rk2 <- ranked[ids$ENSEMBL]; names(rk2) <- ids$ENTREZID; rk2 <- sort(rk2, decreasing = TRUE)

  kk2 <- gseKEGG(geneList     = rk2,
                 organism     = "gga",
                 minGSSize    = 3,
                 maxGSSize    = 800,
                 pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
                 pAdjustMethod = if (legacy) "none" else "BH",
                 keyType       = "ncbi-geneid")

  pdf(file.path(output_dir, "KEGG_GSEA_dotplot.pdf"))
  print(dotplot(kk2, showCategory = 10, split = ".sign") +
          facet_grid(. ~ .sign))
  dev.off()
}
```

## 10  Session info
```{r session-info}
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), file.path(output_dir, "sessionInfo.txt"))
```
